prs.title: cache: guard null fields in Entry.writeTo() to fix NPE (#8962)
Trim trailing whitespace in cookie value: JavaNetCookieJar to avoid crash
Impose limits on HTTP/2 headers sizes
Added Android API check and dump tasks for the okhttp project.
Fix a binary-incompatible API change in Interceptor.Chain
Add copyright headers to some files that don't have 'em
Document WebSocket 16 MiB outgoing queue limit (#8123)
Prevent flaky tests by adding sleep in HttpOverHttp2Test
Enable Gradle Configuration Cache — by refactoring OSGi/BND plugin
Smoosh CI jobs together using matrix
Adopt a full modern gradle build
Move robolectric config to the right location
Use specific old build for ALPN testing
Avoid a problem test with BC
Bury the Version 4.x section in CHANGELOG.md
Fix flaky platformTrustedCertificates test for non-Entrust platforms
Clear a bunch of lint warnings.
Make the publish action work like Okio's
Don't run remote tests in CI
Add tags to calls, including computable tags
Run all the tests in CI
Fix some failing tests that CI hasn't been running
Move the Android test README under the androidTest directory
Support Request Bodies on HTTP1.1 Connection Upgrades
Be more strict on event lifecycle for upgrades
Build an computeIfAbsent() mechanism for tags
Fix SSL Handshake issue affecting MockWebserver on Android 24
Resolve local.properties in a VS Code safe way
Revert "Add minimal HttpLoggingInterceptor support for streaming request and responses. (#8993)"
Put Brotli and Gzip in top-level files
Reduce flakes by not unit testing in check
Fix RequestBody events on upgraded connections
Get Content-Type from the request body
Make Request.toCurl work more like Chrome's 'copy as cURL'
feat: add curl() method to Request for generating cURL commands
Use a single synchronized block in Dispatcher
Allow HTTP/1.1 Upgrades with empty RequestBody
Introduce events for the dispatcher queue
Add multi-release jars to enable Java Modules
Add test that covers MockWebServer and URLConnection with 100-Continue
Revert "refactor(SSE): move static functions to extensions (#9010)"
Remove unnecessary control flow from a test
Add a test of keep rules
refactor(SSE): move static functions to extensions
Add minimal HttpLoggingInterceptor support for streaming request and responses.
Fix merge issue with modules and logging
Discard trailing data after a deflated message
Add Kotlin version of UploadProgress and update recipe
Print URLs in HttpLoggingInterceptor when the call fails
Assert these chars are skipped in hostnames: " < > ^ ` { | }
